name: esp_wireguard
description: Vendored droscy/esp_wireguard (WireGuard for ESP32). Local patch: X25519 routed through meshtastic/Crypto's Curve25519 instead of libsodium, so no esphome/libsodium ESP-IDF component is pulled and the Arduino-framework build works. See src/crypto.h and src/x25519_curve25519.cpp.
